description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a tall green hedge and situated on a rectangular lot with a paved driveway. The house features a hip roof with a muted teal color and a symmetrical facade with large rectangular windows. The front yard is landscaped with bushes and a central walkway leading to a double-door entryway. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and a small garden with stepping stones. There is a car parked in the driveway, and mature trees are positioned at the corners of the lot, providing shade and privacy. The overall design is orderly and residential, with clear boundaries and a well-maintained appearance.
description: A two-story suburban house with a teal hip roof, surrounded by a hedge, featuring a driveway, pool, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with a parked car, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, driveway, and partial view of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, and garden features in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, garden, and additional landscaping with trees and hedges.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with steps, flanked by bushes and a paved walkway, no porch or columns.
